zh.la Queue-en-Brie, Val-de-Marne, Paris, I: 法國i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-德-馬內拉 可--布利
zh.Neufbourg, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, Fra: 法國諾門迪瑟-馬利布格
zh.lifeSummary: 當Marguerite de Neufbourg於大約1220年出生在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利布格時，她的父親Robert du Neubourg56歲，母親Marguerite FitzRobert Of Gloucester52歲。她和Amaury IV de Meulan, Sgr de Gournay-sur-Marne et de la Queue-en-Brie至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1277年8月19日在法國享年58歲，埋葬在法國。

zh-hans.la Queue-en-Brie, Val-de-Marne, Paris, I: 法国i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-德-馬內拉 可--布利
zh-hans.Neufbourg, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, Fra: 法国諾門迪瑟-馬利布格
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marguerite de Neufbourg于大约1220年出生在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利布格时，她的父亲Robert du Neubourg56岁，母亲Marguerite FitzRobert Of Gloucester52岁。她和Amaury IV de Meulan, Sgr de Gournay-sur-Marne et de la Queue-en-Brie至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1277年8月19日在法国享年58岁，埋葬在法国。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Marguerite de Neufbourg was born about 1220, in Neufbourg, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France, her father, Robert du Neubourg, was 56 and her mother, Marguerite FitzRobert Of Gloucester, was 52. She had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Amaury IV de Meulan, Sgr de Gournay-sur-Marne et de la Queue-en-Brie. She died on 19 August 1277, in France, at the age of 58, and was buried in France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marguerite de Neufbourg est née environ 1220, à Neufbourg, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France, son père, Robert du Neubourg, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Marguerite FitzRobert Of Gloucester, avait 52 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Amaury IV de Meulan, Sgr de Gournay-sur-Marne et de la Queue-en-Brie. Elle est décédée le 19 août 1277, à France, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marguerite de Neufbourg um 1220 in Neufbourg, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert du Neubourg 56 und ihre Mutter Marguerite FitzRobert Of Gloucester 52. Sie hatte mit Amaury IV de Meulan, Sgr de Gournay-sur-Marne et de la Queue-en-Brie mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 19. August 1277 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Frankreich und wurde in Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Neufbourg è nata il circa 1220 nel Neufbourg, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Robert du Neubourg, aveva 56 anni e sua madre, Marguerite FitzRobert Of Gloucester, aveva 52 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Amaury IV de Meulan, Sgr de Gournay-sur-Marne et de la Queue-en-Brie. Morì il 19 agosto 1277, nel Francia, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolta a Francia.

ja.la Queue-en-Brie, Val-de-Marne, Paris, I: フランスiレ-デ-フランスヴァル-デ-マルンラ クエウエ-エン-ブリー
ja.Neufbourg, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, Fra: フランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメネウフボウルグ
ja.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Neufbourgが約1220年にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメネウフボウルグで生まれた時，父Robert du Neubourgは56歳，母Marguerite FitzRobert Of Gloucesterは52歳であった。彼女はAmaury IV de Meulan, Sgr de Gournay-sur-Marne et de la Queue-en-Brieとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1277年8月19日にフランスで58歳で死去し，フランスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Neufbourg(이)가 대략 1220년 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 니우프보우르그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert du Neubourg(은)는 56세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marguerite FitzRobert Of Gloucester(은)는 52세였다. 그녀는 Amaury IV de Meulan, Sgr de Gournay-sur-Marne et de la Queue-en-Brie(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1277년 8월 19일 프랑스에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Neufbourg nasceu aproximadamente 1220, em Neufbourg, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França, seu pai, Robert du Neubourg, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite FitzRobert Of Gloucester, tinha 52 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Amaury IV de Meulan, Sgr de Gournay-sur-Marne et de la Queue-en-Brie. Ela faleceu em 19 de agosto de 1277, em França, com 58 anos, e foi sepultada em França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marguerite de Neufbourg родилась около 1220 г. в местности неуфбург, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Robert du Neubourg было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Marguerite FitzRobert Of Gloucester, 52. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Amaury IV de Meulan, Sgr de Gournay-sur-Marne et de la Queue-en-Brie. Она умерла 19 августа 1277 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marguerite de Neufbourg nació aproximadamente 1220, en Neufbourg, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Robert du Neubourg, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Marguerite FitzRobert Of Gloucester, tenía 52 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Amaury IV de Meulan, Sgr de Gournay-sur-Marne et de la Queue-en-Brie. Murió el 19 de agosto de 1277, en Francia, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultada en Francia.
